name: STG · INFRA · Webhook → Operator Version Update Prompt Swap · ANS
description: INFRA | Admin-only. Validates token, upserts system prompt to operator_prompts table by component name. All Claude workflows fetch prompts from this table at runtime for hot-swap without redeployment. OWNER: Ansh | p1:high | ENV: STG

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ component: $json.component, system_prompt: $json.new_system_prompt, version: $json.version_label, is_known_component: $json.is_known_component, updated_at: $json.updated_at }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ updated: true, component: $('Code - Validate and Sanitize').first().json.component, version_label: $('Code - Validate and Sanitize').first().json.version_label, is_known_component: $('Code - Validate and Sanitize').first().json.is_known_component, updated_at: $('Code - Validate and Sanitize').first().json.updated_at }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ workflow_name: 'STG · INFRA · Webhook → Operator Version Update Prompt Swap · ANS', error_message: $json.error.message, error_node: $json.execution.lastNodeExecuted, execution_id: $execution.id, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
